title: funky gadgets King Size Duvet Cover Sets Charcoal, Microfiber Satin Stripe Duvet Cover Luxury Hotel Bedding Set with Pillowcases Breathable Ultra Soft Reversible Quilt Covers.
features: Enhance your bedroom with our magnificent satin Striped Duvet Cover Set, which includes 1 charcoal kingsize duvet cover set (230x220cm), two matching pillowcases (50x75 cm).
Experience ultimate comfort with our luxury 3-piece hotel bedding sets king size, crafted from ultra-soft Brushed microfiber with satin stripes for a smooth, plush touch.
STITCHING AND CLOSURE: Single Quilt cover/ duvet cover & Pillowcases has a Envelope Closure that keeps the pillow inserted in place. Long-term endurance is ensured by precise stitching.
OEKO-TEX certified Reversible duvet cover is soft on both sides, hypoallergenic, and skin-friendly, perfect for bedrooms and guest rooms.
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Our satin stripe duvet set is machine-washable at a low temperature (up to40°c), Air dry or tumble dried and iron on low heat. Do not Bleach.
